zh: 你好，请问洗手间在哪里？
pinyin: nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn xǐ shǒu jiān zài nǎ lǐ?
en: Hello, excuse me, where is the restroom?

pinyin: zhè ge duō shao qián?
en: How much is this?

pinyin: wǒ yào yì bēi chá.
en: I want a cup of tea.

pinyin: qǐng gěi wǒ cài dān.
en: Please give me the menu.

pinyin: wǒ bù dǒng, qǐng shuō màn yì diǎn.
en: I don't understand, please speak slower.

pinyin: wǒ yào qù jī chǎng.
en: I want to go to the airport.

pinyin: tài guì le, pián yi yì diǎn ba.
en: Too expensive, make it cheaper.

pinyin: qǐng wèn dì tiě zhàn zài nǎ lǐ?
en: Excuse me, where is the subway station?

pinyin: wǒ xiǎng mǎi liǎng zhāng piào.
en: I want to buy two tickets.

pinyin: zhè ge cài hěn hǎo chī.
en: This dish is very delicious.

pinyin: wǒ zhù zài zhè ge jiǔ diàn.
en: I'm staying at this hotel.

pinyin: nǐ huì shuō yīng yǔ ma?
en: Do you speak English?

pinyin: wǎng zuǒ zǒu hái shi wǎng yòu zǒu?
en: Go left or go right?

pinyin: wǒ yào yì píng shuǐ.
en: I want a bottle of water.

pinyin: míng tiān zǎo shang jǐ diǎn chū fā?
en: What time do we leave tomorrow morning?

zh: 可以帮我叫一个出租车吗？
pinyin: kě yǐ bāng wǒ jiào yí gè chū zū chē ma?
en: Can you help me call a taxi?

pinyin: wǒ shì měi guó rén.
en: I am American.

pinyin: mǎi dān, xiè xie.
en: Check please, thank you.

pinyin: qǐng wèn fù jìn yǒu yī yuàn ma?
en: Excuse me, is there a hospital nearby?

pinyin: wǒ de péng you zài nà lǐ.
en: My friend is over there.
